personality: 7 Dark-First Utility with 6 Glass / Luxe spacing
personality_one_liner: An executive intelligence-briefing tool that feels like a premium, high-trust classified dossier with calm Apple-like typography and stark contrast.

spacing.rule: Apple-style generous spacing for a premium feel. Use generous padding (lg/xl) around elements and avoid cramped dashboard utility styling.

do's: Use glassmorphism selectively for the bottom tab bar and sticky headers to create Apple-like premium depth over black backgrounds.
dont's: Do not use blur on body cards, inputs, or data cards; keep the utility stark, solid, and highly readable.

screens.name: Splash
screens.purpose: Establish the premium executive intelligence vibe immediately.

states.loading: Static splash mark with subtle fade in.

screens.layout: Center a red radar/target mark on a pure #050505 black background. Use white headline typography reading 'DeepPrep — Interview intelligence from public web research'. No other UI chrome.

screens.name: Onboarding
screens.purpose: Long premium wizard collecting job situation, level, industry, date, interviewers, and JD evidence.

states.error: Red validation text for missing required fields.

screens.layout: Use a sequence of screens with a progress dot indicator at the top. Use thin-bordered rounded cards (#111111 background with #2A2A2A border) for single-select option rows (with chevron) and multi-select concern chips. Large text areas for JD evidence must include a character counter. Primary CTA pinned to the bottom must be WHITE with BLACK text.

screens.name: Progress Theatre
screens.purpose: Animated sequential checklist mimicking a deep-web scan.

states.loading: Active scanning state animating through checklist items.

screens.layout: Vertical list of steps: 'Finding company', 'Matching interviewer', 'Checking freshness', 'Preparing brief'. Highlight current step in white, pending in textSecondary (#A3A3A3). Add a checkmark and trigger haptics as each step completes.

screens.name: Scan Result
screens.purpose: Free limited intel scan result card showing match confidence and key insights.
screens.layout: Central dashboard layout. Top area features a match-confidence meter. Below, use thin bordered cards for role freshness, 3 key insights (bulleted list), 1 likely question, and 1 talking point. Use success (#20C06B) and warning (#F5B83D) text sparingly for data points.

screens.name: Review & Paywall
screens.purpose: Dedicated feedback prompt followed by a hard paywall to unlock the full report.
screens.layout: Review screen asks 'Enjoying DeepPrep?' with a love-it/continue flow. The Paywall screen completely blocks access with NO close/X button. Dark charcoal (#111111) background. Features checklist uses white text. The CTA must be RED (#FF2D2D) with white text reading 'Continue to Full Report'.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Main dashboard showing upcoming interviews and past briefs.

states.loading: Skeleton cards for next interview and recent list.
states.empty: Empty state illustration using a subtle dark abstract SVG and 'Start your first brief' CTA.
states.error: Error fetching briefs, with a retry button.

screens.layout: Top section: large hero card for 'Next Interview' with a countdown timer. Middle section: 'Credits remaining' pill indicator. Bottom section: Vertical list of 'Recent Briefs' inside thin-bordered cards. Bottom tab nav included (Home, Briefs, Alerts, Settings).

screens.name: Report
screens.layout: Sticky header with Segmented Control or top tabs (Overview, Dossiers, Questions, Day-of). The 'Interviewer Dossier' tab uses cards featuring an avatar, MATCH/FRESH badges (using success/warning colors), and a vertical career path timeline using subtle left borders.

splash_radar.alt: red and white light streaks abstract radar

interviewer_avatar.alt: man wearing black notched lapel suit jacket professional executive avatar

instructions_to_main_agent: STRICT COLOR ENFORCEMENT: Only use the exact colors requested. background #050505, surface #111111, surfaceRaised #171717, border #2A2A2A. Use #F5F5F5 for primary text, #A3A3A3 for secondary text, and #6B6B6B for muted text. No other grays.
No gradients allowed anywhere unless extremely subtle. Do not use purple or blue SaaS styling.
Do not use ANY emojis in the UI. Strictly use Feather icons from @expo/vector-icons.
BUTTONS: Primary CTA buttons during onboarding MUST be WHITE with black text. The Paywall CTA MUST be RED (#FF2D2D) with white text. Secondary buttons should use #111111 background with white text.
BORDERS & CARDS: Cards must use thin borders (borderWidth: 1, borderColor: '#2A2A2A') with rounded corners (md or lg) and no heavy shadows.
PAYWALL: The Paywall screen is a HARD paywall. There must be NO close or X button. Users cannot dismiss it without paying.

PROGRESS THEATRE: Implement a staggered animation for the scanning progress checklist, ensuring haptic feedback fires as each step (finding company -> matching interviewer -> checking freshness -> preparing brief) completes.
DOSSIER: On the Interviewer Dossier tab, make sure the MATCH and FRESH badges use the success (#20C06B) and warning (#F5B83D) colors respectively to stand out against the dark UI.
No childish illustrations. Only use premium, professional, and subtle visual treatments.
